candidate_llm_application: LLM hallucination evidence aggregation: each generation is under-determined; aggregate prior+likelihood to evaluate factual claim; adversarial hallucination-detector co-evolution.

results.title: Hallucination Detection / Fact-Checking Adversarial Robustness: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on hallucination detection / fact-checking adversarial robustness, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
